description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular green plot with a minimalist landscape design. The structure features flat roofs, large glass windows, and a combination of light-colored concrete or stucco walls. The front includes a driveway leading to a covered garage, with a car parked outside and a paved walkway to the main entrance. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious patio area with a swimming pool and outdoor seating, surrounded by scattered trees and shrubs. The building's layout is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a sense of openness and flow between indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with an emphasis on open sightlines and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, a garage, a swimming pool, and landscaped greenery on a rectangular plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and several trees on the lawn.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the swimming pool, patio area, and more of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the pool, patio, and large glass windows opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Side-rear view with a clear look at the pool, patio, and the garage structure at the far end.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
